aiEngine.description: Required credentials must be saved before activating an engine.
aiEngine.title: Current AI Engine
aiRegenerateGenerated.description: Regenerate nodes whose inputs/parameters have not changed (already have «GENERATED» status).
aiRegenerateGenerated.label: Regenerate AI-generated changes
aiRegenerateManual.description: Regenerate nodes that had manual edits after generation, including AI-assisted improvements (have «MANUAL» status).
aiRegenerateManual.label: Regenerate manual changes
autoGenerateSummary.description: Automatically generate a short summary (5–10 words) for plan nodes when content changes.
autoGenerateSummary.label: Auto-summary generation
theme.title: Theme
uiLanguage.title: Interface Language
verboseAiLogging.description: Prints full request headers (API key masked) and body to the server console for every AI API call. Use when diagnosing AI integration issues.
verboseAiLogging.label: Verbose AI request logging
